title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVII. Natural History.
content:
[Imitated from a pigeon.]

        Curr dhoo, curr dhoo,
        Love me, and I'll love you!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
